title: 重命名核心代码符号与服务文案
stageGoal: 将项目代码中的 Ralph 命名替换为 Harness，包括语言包、帮助文档构建器、状态栏文案、运行时消息、类型名、函数名和常量名，并保证 TypeScript 编译与测试编译通过。
summary: Completed the core Ralph-to-Harness rename sweep across exported symbols, runtime/help/status copy, prompt contracts, synthesized artifact wording, workspace path helpers, and related test assertions.
architectureNotes: Runtime branding and exported API renames were treated as one unit so extension.ts, localization.ts, helpManual.ts, and tests stay aligned.
The .harness-runner directory remains the canonical artifact root, so the rename avoided persistence-path migration work.
Backward-compatible cleanup of old ralph-runner workspace settings remains in place to avoid breaking existing users during the rename.
keyDecisions: Adopt Harness as the active name in runtime text, help content, prompt contracts, and synthesized fallback artifacts.
Rename shared exported helpers and types to Harness-prefixed names instead of leaving mixed internal APIs.
Leave legacy ralph-runner compatibility deletion paths untouched while removing Ralph from the active user-facing surface.
confirmedConstraints: Validation ran through npm run compile and npm run compile-tests.
No dist/ or out/ files were hand-edited.
unresolvedRisks: The icon asset path and packaged VSIX filename still use legacy ralph naming.
Repository slug and some compatibility-oriented test fixtures still contain ralph identifiers outside the active runtime surface.
nextStoryPrerequisites: If branding must be fully normalized, audit package assets and repository metadata next.
If broader verification is desired, run the full npm test suite after this rename story.
resumeRecommendation: Continue from this completed state by reviewing remaining non-runtime branding artifacts such as icon filenames, VSIX output, and repository metadata rather than reopening the core symbol rename itself.

dimensions.label: Architecture Consistency
dimensions.summary: Core rename surfaces and tests are aligned.

dimensions.label: Acceptance Coverage
dimensions.summary: Acceptance rename targets are reflected in code and strings.

dimensions.label: Change Scope Control
dimensions.summary: The story did not alter prd.json or runtime artifact-root paths.

dimensions.label: Verifiability
dimensions.summary: Compile and test-compilation evidence are attached.
